title: ELDEN RING

notes:
Launched the game yesterday, got to the menu but closed the game shortly after because my Xbox One controller wasn't recognized. After dealing with my controller, I launched the game again and, not even half an hour later, the game wouldn't launch. Tried Proton Experimental, Proton 7.0-6 and -fullscreen. Also tried verifying the Game files a few times. 

When I click on 'Play' steam recognizes the game as running even though the actual game isn't launching. When I then click on 'Stop' steam takes an unusual amount of time to close the game, to the point where I have to force quit steam to close Elden Ring.

Going by what other users say on here, the game won't launch because of a recent update. So until this is fixed, no point in trying further.
title: ELDEN RING
